content_body:
Blue Ridge, Georgia is a beautiful mountain town located in the Chattahoochee National Forest. It's a popular destination for couples looking to enjoy the great outdoors, spend quality time together, and fall in love all over again. Here are some fun couple activities to consider during a visit to Blue Ridge:

A Blue Ridge romantic getaway 

Spend a few days relaxing in your luxury Blue Ridge cabin rental nestled in the mountains, enjoying the peace and quiet of the surrounding forest. Spend your mornings sipping coffee on the deck watching a gorgeous mountain sunrise, then at the end of the day relax in the hot tub soaking in the stunning North GA Mountain views. Rekindle the flame of romance in front of a crackling fire in your cozy cabin. 


A Blue Ridge nature-filled adventure 

Whether you love heart-racing adventure or a slower paced speed, Blue Ridge has it all from gorgeous mountain views, lush forests, colorful seasonal foliage, sparkling blue lake waters, rushing rivers where you can experience Blue Ridge to the fullest. Go hiking in the Chattahoochee National Forest, kayaking on the Toccoa River, or horseback riding through the mountains. Be sure to hike the Swinging Bridge and even Fall Branch Falls waterfall just minutes from Downtown Blue Ridge. Blue Ridge, GA is a nature-lover’s paradise.

A Blue Ridge cultural experience

Visit the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway and learn about the history of the area, or visit the Swan Drive-In Theatre for a throwback movie experience. Blue Ridge Community Theatre features live plays and live music depending on your visit. Most breweries offer live music for a fun night out on the town. The art scene is huge in Blue Ridge with the Blue Ridge Mountain Arts Center making Blue Ridge a “Top Art Town” in the USA ~ depending on the time of year, enjoy Arts in the Park Festivals and exhibitions. 

 


A Blue Ridge foodie trip

Visit the Mercier Orchards to pick your own apples and try those famous fried apple pies. Blue Ridge is a foodie paradise offering fine dining and fun eateries. Share a romantic dinner at ROE.Steak and Seafood, arguably one of the best restaurants in Blue Ridge. For best pizza, including gluten-free options, Cucinella’s Pizzaria is hugely popular. Mystic Mountain Pizza is another popular pizzeria, offering a very cool vibe, live music, and just plain groovy. 



A Blue Ridge wellness retreat 

Visit one of the few spas in the area for a couples massage, or better yet, experience an in-cabin couples massage where they come to you in the comfort of your own luxury cabin rental. Check out Serenity in the Mountains Spa and Tea Trees Boutique Spa to see their list of offerings. While in Blue Ridge, be sure to stop by Zen & Juice Juice Bar, a hip place for your healthy juice. The Folk Collaborative is a must see in McCaysville, GA just 9 miles north of Blue Ridge. Offering all organic and harvested herbs, mountain medicinals, salves, local produce, teas, mountain knowledge, and all thing folk.

Blue Ridge is for lovers. No matter what your interests are, Blue Ridge, GA has something for every couple to enjoy.
title: 5 Activities for Couples To Do in Blue Ridge
